issues.message: Error from http://tx.fhir.org/r4: Unparseable HTML

The fullUrl 'http://example.org/fhir/Patient/bad-entry' looks like a RESTful server URL, so it must end with the correct type and id (/Patient/stress-bad-url-patient)
Validate Observation against the Body height profile (http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/bodyheight) which is required by the FHIR specification because the LOINC code 8302-2 was found
